𝗨𝗡𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗔𝗜𝗦𝗨𝗣𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧 | To enable Unreal Engine developers to easily integrate and leverage cutting-edge LLM and Generative AI capabilities for in-game content creation, dynamic world generation, and intelligent NPC behavior.  📈 Growing!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable Unreal Engine developers to easily integrate and leverage cutting-edge LLM and Generative AI capabilities for in-game content creation, dynamic world generation, and intelligent NPC behavior.
📅 Created: Nov 2024 • Updated: Mar 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Integration of multiple LLM/GenAI APIs (OpenAI, Deepseek, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, Kimi, Grok)
✅ Automatic scene generation from AI prompts
✅ NPC agentic instance creation
✅ Blueprint, function, variable generation and manipulation via AI
✅ Component addition and Python script execution via AI
✅ Support for Unreal Engine 5.4.4
✅ Focus on APIs useful for game development, evals, and interactive experiences


❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 478 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 74 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Unreal Engine plugin integrates various Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI (GenAI) models directly into the game development workflow. It simplifies the process of using AI for tasks like scene generation, NPC behavior, and content creation within Unreal Engine, supporting a wide range of popular AI APIs.

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/prajwalshettydev/UnrealGenAISupport

𝗦𝗘𝗠𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗦 | Enabling efficient semantic search and AI-powered question answering over local document collections directly from the command line.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling efficient semantic search and AI-powered question answering over local document collections directly from the command line.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fast semantic search using model2vec embeddings
✅ Reliable document parsing with caching and error handling
✅ Unix-friendly design with proper stdin/stdout handling
✅ Configurable distance thresholds and returned chunk sizes
✅ Multi-format support for parsing documents (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.)
✅ Concurrent processing for better parsing performance
✅ Workspace management for efficient document retrieval over large collections


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 125 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SemTools is a high-performance command-line interface (CLI) tool built in Rust for semantic search and document parsing. It allows users to parse various document formats, perform local semantic keyword searches using multilingual embeddings, and interact with documents via an AI agent for question answering.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/run-llama/semtools

𝗔𝗘𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥 | To easily create and apply cohesive desktop themes by extracting colors from wallpapers, supporting a wide range of applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To easily create and apply cohesive desktop themes by extracting colors from wallpapers, supporting a wide range of applications.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Color Extraction from wallpapers
✅ Wallpaper Browser (wallhaven.cc, local files)
✅ Image Filters (blur, exposure, presets)
✅ Color Presets (Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox, Catppuccin)
✅ Base16 Import
✅ Theme Blueprints (JSON)
✅ Multi-App Support (15+ apps)
✅ Theme Scheduler

Aether is a visual theming application for Omarchy and other Linux desktops. It allows users to extract color palettes from wallpapers, apply them to various applications, and manage themes through a graphical interface or command line.

𝗡𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗔𝗟𝗘 | To provide a robust and intelligent alerting system for monitoring infrastructure and applications, integrating with existing data sources and offering advanced alarm processing and distribution.  🌟 Rising Fast!

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a robust and intelligent alerting system for monitoring infrastructure and applications, integrating with existing data sources and offering advanced alarm processing and distribution.
📅 Created: Mar 2020 • Updated: Mar 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source alerting expert
✅ Connects with various existing data sources (e.g., VictoriaMetrics, ElasticSearch)
✅ Configurable alerting and notification rules
✅ AI assistant integration via MCP-Server for natural language interaction
✅ Supports Prometheus Remote Write protocol
✅ Distributed deployment mode for edge data centers
✅ Developed by DiDi.inc, donated to CCF ODTC

Nightingale is an open-source alerting and monitoring system designed to work with existing data sources. It focuses on efficient processing and distribution of alarms, offering capabilities similar to Grafana but with a stronger emphasis on the alerting engine.

𝗥𝗨𝗩𝗜𝗘𝗪 | Enabling non-visual, real-time human sensing and monitoring in environments using existing WiFi infrastructure.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling non-visual, real-time human sensing and monitoring in environments using existing WiFi infrastructure.
📅 Created: Jun 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ WiFi DensePose for human pose estimation
✅ Vital sign monitoring (breathing rate, heart rate)
✅ Presence detection
✅ Edge AI system running on low-power hardware (ESP32)
✅ Self-learning and adaptation without cameras or cloud infrastructure
✅ Real-time signal analysis using CSI


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

RuView is an edge AI perception system that uses commodity WiFi signals to perform real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection without cameras or wearables. It analyzes Channel State Information (CSI) disturbances to reconstruct body position and physiological data, operating entirely on low-power hardware like ESP32.

MapLibre GL JS is an open-source JavaScript library for displaying interactive vector tile maps on websites and web applications. It leverages GPU acceleration for fast rendering and originated as a fork of mapbox-gl-js.
